what_it_does: Records a noticeboard item that states the Templates section is not applicable, because board items are created programmatically by cc_board rather than typed by hand in Obsidian.
observations: YAML frontmatter includes id, address, type:block, source:claude_code, state:current, title 'P11 · 8. Templates — NONE', author_session, channel:dragnet-development, and a part_of link to item-3480c157.
Body is a short rationale explaining that templates help humans type new notes in Obsidian, but this write path is automated.
Created and updated timestamps are identical, indicating initial filing.
standouts: Explicitly classifies the Templates topic as NONE / irrelevant.
The argument hinges on automation (cc_board) versus human Obsidian usage.
Linked as part_of another board item.
conventions: Uses ledger-style YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, source, state, title, links, and history.
concerns: The irrelevance claim is absolute; it assumes no future human editing or hybrid creation path.
notes: A noticeboard item that rules Obsidian templates out of scope because board items are created by cc_board, not by hand.
questions: What is cc_board and how does it create items?
Who is Tim and what role do they play?
What is the content of item-3480c157?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to document that templates are irrelevant to the write path, and the content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It is trying to justify omitting templates from a design discussion by emphasizing that entries are machine-generated rather than human-typed.
novelty: Explicit negative-scope item that rejects a standard Obsidian feature because of an API-driven creation path.
contribution: Captures a scope decision and its rationale—that templates are unnecessary for the cc_board write path—so a fused system can preserve the reasoning behind the omission.
summary_for_embedding: Noticeboard item declaring that Obsidian templates are irrelevant because board items are created automatically by cc_board rather than typed by a user.
intention_for_embedding: Record the rationale for excluding templates from the design and write path of the noticeboard system.
